resources.label: Resources
resources.description: Infrastructure, devices, services, data flows that exist in a setting.

conversion_factors.label: Conversion factors
conversion_factors.description: Personal, social, and environmental conditions allowing conversion of resources to capability.

capabilities.label: Capabilities
capabilities.description: Substantive freedoms a person has to do or be online.

macro_context.label: Macro context (not capability)
macro_context.description: Macroeconomic / structural indicator that does not target any layer.

WB_BX.KLT.DINV.WD.GD.ZS.name: FDI net inflows (% of GDP)
WB_BX.KLT.DINV.WD.GD.ZS.mechanism: Capital-account indicator. Has no plausible mechanism by which it captures digital connectivity, capability, or functioning. Currently retained by gating thresholds; flagged for removal in next release.
WB_BX.KLT.DINV.WD.GD.ZS.replacement: Drop. No substitute needed within ACC.

WB_IT.NET.SECR.P6.name: Secure Internet servers per million
WB_IT.NET.SECR.P6.mechanism: Supply-side resource indicator. Skewed by hosting-industry concentration (small economies hosting major data centres rank disproportionately).
WB_IT.NET.SECR.P6.replacement: Keep with hosting-concentration caveat; supplement with ITU 4G+ population coverage.

WB_IT.NET.USER.ZS.name: Individuals using the Internet (% of population)
WB_IT.NET.USER.ZS.mechanism: Use-coverage resource indicator. Strongest of the ACC indicators currently in scope.
WB_IT.NET.USER.ZS.replacement: Keep. Triangulate with ITU IDI sub-indicator.

WB_IT.CEL.SETS.P2.name: Mobile cellular subscriptions per 100
WB_IT.CEL.SETS.P2.mechanism: Device-penetration resource indicator. Inflated by multi-SIM markets; does not distinguish smartphone from feature-phone.
WB_IT.CEL.SETS.P2.replacement: Replace with ITU mobile-broadband subscriptions per 100, or keep with double-count caveat.

WB_CC.PER.RNK.name: Control of Corruption percentile
WB_CC.PER.RNK.mechanism: Macro-political institutional-quality composite. Does not target digital agency. Contested in the political-science literature (Apaza 2009; Thomas 2010; Langbein and Knack 2010).
WB_CC.PER.RNK.replacement: Drop. Replace AGR with Freedom House Freedom on the Net sub-scores; GSMA Mobile Gender Gap; Findex female-controlled account; SDG 16.10.2.

WB_PV.PER.RNK.name: Political Stability and Absence of Violence percentile
WB_PV.PER.RNK.mechanism: Macro-political indicator. Same critique as CC.PER.RNK.

WB_SL.TLF.CACT.ZS.name: Labour force participation rate (% pop 15+)
WB_SL.TLF.CACT.ZS.replacement: Drop from ECO. Use as a control. Replace with Findex digital-payment use; ILOSTAT ICT-occupation share.

WB_SL.UEM.TOTL.ZS.name: Unemployment (% labour force)
WB_SL.UEM.TOTL.ZS.replacement: Drop from ECO. Use as a control.

WB_NY.GDP.PCAP.KD.ZG.name: GDP per capita growth (annual %)
WB_NY.GDP.PCAP.KD.ZG.mechanism: Macro-economic stock. Should be a control, not an ECO indicator.

WB_SP.POP.GROW.name: Population growth (annual %)
WB_SP.POP.GROW.mechanism: Demographic indicator with no plausible mechanism from digital capability. Suitable as a placebo outcome.
WB_SP.POP.GROW.replacement: Drop from OUT. Use as placebo P3 in the robustness protocol.

WB_AG.LND.AGRI.ZS.name: Agricultural land share (% land area)
WB_AG.LND.AGRI.ZS.mechanism: Land-use indicator. Suitable as a placebo outcome.
WB_AG.LND.AGRI.ZS.replacement: Drop from OUT. Use as placebo P3.

WB_EG.CFT.ACCS.ZS.name: Access to clean cooking fuels (% pop)
WB_EG.CFT.ACCS.ZS.mechanism: Energy-access functioning. Weakly tied to digital capability through grid-electrification correlation. Demote to context covariate.
WB_EG.CFT.ACCS.ZS.replacement: Demote to context. Replace with Findex digital-channel account use; WHO digital-health uptake.

WB_SE.TER.ENRR.name: Tertiary gross enrolment (% relevant age)
WB_SE.TER.ENRR.mechanism: General education stock. Does not target digital skills.

WTO_SERVICES_TOTAL_EXPORTS.name: Services exports, total
WTO_SERVICES_TOTAL_EXPORTS.mechanism: Macro-economic services-trade. Has no mechanism by which it captures digital service-uptake by households.
WTO_SERVICES_TOTAL_EXPORTS.replacement: Drop. Replace SRV with WB GovTech Maturity Index, UN EGDI, Findex digital-payment use, WHO digital-health monitoring.

ACC_pop_hh_elec.name: Households with electricity (%)
ACC_pop_hh_elec.mechanism: Electricity is a conversion factor for digital access; it is not digital connectivity itself.
ACC_pop_hh_elec.replacement: Demote to conversion factor. Add NFHS internet-use indicator.

SKL_fem_literacy.name: Female literacy rate
SKL_fem_literacy.mechanism: General literacy is a conversion factor for digital literacy; not digital skill itself.
SKL_fem_literacy.replacement: Keep as conversion factor; add SDG 4.4.1-style ICT skill from NSS-PLFS.

SRV_pop_hh_sf.name: Population with sanitation facility (%)
SRV_pop_hh_sf.mechanism: Sanitation is not a digital service.
SRV_pop_hh_sf.replacement: Drop or move to context. Replace with PMJAY digital-claims share, eSanjeevani teleconsults per capita.

AGR_fem_15_24_hyg_period.name: Females 15-24 using hygienic period products (%)
AGR_fem_15_24_hyg_period.replacement: Drop or move to context. Replace with female mobile ownership (NFHS); female bank-account control.

ECO_prop_hh_microfin.name: Households with microfinance access (%)
ECO_prop_hh_microfin.replacement: Keep; supplement with UPI per-capita usage.

NAT_upi_total_vol.name: UPI transactions, total volume (national)
NAT_upi_total_vol.mechanism: National-level digital-payment functioning. Currently applied uniformly across all states; contributes nothing to within-year state variation.
NAT_upi_total_vol.replacement: Move to year-context. Replace with state-level UPI from NPCI state dashboards.
